name: superloopflow
description: Unified LOOP-era development orchestrator. v0.5 uses READ-ONLY plugin discovery. /superloopflow:* commands dynamically bridge to installed plugins by reading their plugin.json + commands + skills frontmatter. NO writes to any third-party plugin directory.

plugins.name: superloopflow
plugins.description: Unified LOOP-era development entry point. 22+ /superloopflow:* commands dynamically bridge to plugins via READ-ONLY discovery. 13 skills for orchestrating agents, skills, code, and agentic tools.
